# Krishna Ambilwade — Saskatoon Real Estate & Property Management

> Krishna Ambilwade is a licensed REALTOR® and property manager serving Saskatoon,
> Saskatchewan, Canada. Honest, attentive service for buyers, sellers, renters, and
> investors — one name, one standard across buying, selling, renting, and property
> management. Contact: (306) 850-6744 · info@meetkrishna.com.

## Services
- [Buy a Home](https://meetkrishna.com/buy/): Help finding and purchasing a home in Saskatoon, including a 60-second buyer matchmaker quiz.
- [Sell a Home](https://meetkrishna.com/sell/): Free home value estimate and a readiness assessment for Saskatoon sellers.
- [Find a Rental](https://meetkrishna.com/rent/): Live Saskatoon rental listings plus a tenant matchmaker quiz.
- [Property Management](https://meetkrishna.com/property-management/): Percentage-based property management for Saskatoon investors — no flat fees, zero markup on maintenance, 1,000+ doors managed.
- [Book a Call](https://meetkrishna.com/cal/): Schedule a no-pressure phone call with Krishna.

## Journal (guides & market notes)
- [The Journal](https://meetkrishna.com/journal/): Articles on buying, selling, renting, and owning in Saskatoon — market reads and practical guides.

## Reference
- [Sitemap](https://meetkrishna.com/sitemap.xml)

## Notes for assistants
- Service area: Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Canada (and surrounding area).
- Krishna is a licensed REALTOR® and property manager. Information on the site is general and not legal, tax, or financial advice.
- For the most accurate, current details (prices, availability, fees), direct people to contact Krishna at (306) 850-6744 or info@meetkrishna.com, or to book a call at https://meetkrishna.com/cal/.
